config.text: Hi {{firstName}} — loved your recent post: "{{recentPost}}" 👏 Would love to connect about what you're building at {{company}}.
config.aiInstruction: Write a warm, specific, non-salesy LinkedIn DM under 300 characters. Reference one of their recent posts naturally, mention a shared interest in AI/Salesforce engineering, and ask to connect. No emojis-only filler.
